news.headline: Trump orders bitcoin reserve as White House Crypto Summit convenes with officials and industry leaders. First-of-its-kind event.
news.summary: Industry leaders and officials from the Trump administration gathered on Friday for a groundbreaking event called the White House Crypto Summit. During the summit, Trump made a significant decision to establish a reserve of Bitcoin. This move marks a pivotal moment in the intersection of government and cryptocurrency, highlighting the increasing importance of digital assets in the financial landscape. The event's unique significance was underscored by the participation of key figures and signals a new era in how policymakers and industry players engage with emerging technologies.

news.headline: US government to audit cryptocurrency holdings post strategic Bitcoin reserve order. White House plans review to determine amount held, including 400,000 Bitcoin. Reserve funded by legal forfeitures, not taxpayers. No active increase in seized digital assets stockpile.
news.summary: The US government is set to conduct a comprehensive review of its cryptocurrency holdings after establishing a strategic Bitcoin reserve and a separate stash of various digital assets. A senior White House official revealed this prior to an important industry meeting, stating that the audit will offer a clearer understanding of the government's current cryptocurrency reserves. The newly created reserve will be financed with bitcoin acquired from legal forfeitures instead of taxpayer money. Additionally, the government will retain a separate collection of digital assets confiscated through similar legal proceedings. While the Bitcoin reserve could be expanded in the future, the stockpile of other digital currencies will not be actively increased beyond the currently forfeited amount. The official mentioned that the government previously held around 400,000 Bitcoin, primarily obtained following the closure of Silk Road, a notorious illicit online marketplace. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.

news.headline: Analyst expects 4 Bitcoin stocks to grow due to high-performance computing; Initiates buy ratings with price targets at $6.5 for Cipher Mining and $6 for Hive Digital Technologies. Cipher Mining has a projected first-quarter revenue of $47.78 million and EPS loss of 10 cents.
news.summary: Analyst Chris Brendler of Rosenblatt initiated coverage on Bitcoin stocks, predicting a likely premium due to their entry into the high-performance computing (HPC) business. He started with Cipher Mining (NASDAQ:CIFR) rating it a Buy with a price target of $6.5. Despite recent underperformance, the company is expected to scale rapidly with its 300 MW facility. Brendler forecasted first-quarter revenue of $47.78 million and an EPS loss of 10 cents. He also recommended Hive Digital Technologies (NASDAQ:HIVE) as a Buy with a target price of $6, noting its potential in the Bitcoin mining sector.

news.headline: Stock market dodges jobs report bullet. Crypto reserve details disappoint. Germany may go nuclear. Jobs report: 151K vs 159K, private payrolls 140K vs 145K, hourly earnings 0.3% vs 0.3%.
news.summary: The article discusses the significance of the 200-day moving average in the stock market, noting that it is considered as a major support level by many investors despite lacking analytical evidence. It also highlights that oversold markets tend to bounce back, as indicated by the Relative Strength Index (RSI) on the chart. The article mentions that the stock market narrowly avoided a significant sell-off following the release of the jobs report, which showed nonfarm payrolls at 151K compared to the 159K consensus, nonfarm private payrolls at 140K versus a 145K consensus, average hourly earnings at 0.3% in line with expectations, and the average work week at 34.1 hours compared to the consensus of 34.2. Understanding market mechanics like positioning can provide investors with an edge in volatile times.

news.headline: Ethereum's price at $2,159.01, $260.3B market cap. Traders hopeful for Q2 bullish run as seen historically.
news.summary: Ethereum (ETH) is currently moving within a sideways range despite trader optimism for future gains. The price of Ethereum stands at $2,159.01 with a market cap of $260.3 billion. In the last 24 hours, it has experienced a slight decrease of -2.5% and over the past week, it has fallen by -2.9%.On the other hand, Bitcoin (BTC) is priced at $86,815.85 with a market cap of $1.7 trillion. It has seen a decrease of -2.2% in the last 24 hours, but a positive trend of +3.8% over the past week.XRP is priced at $2.40 with a market cap of $139.4 billion. It experienced a decrease of -6.7% in the last 24 hours, but a significant increase of +12.4% over the past week.Experienced trader Lucky pointed out that Ethereum has historically performed well in the second quarter, with positive returns from 2016 to 2021, except for a minor dip in 2022. Lucky anticipates a bullish second quarter in 2023, which could lead to substantial gains for alternative cryptocurrencies. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TopBuild Corp. reports Q4 sales of $1.31B, 2% Y/Y increase. Gross margin down, shares dip premarket.
news.summary: TopBuild Corp. (NYSE:BLD) is experiencing a premarket dip as the company revealed fourth-quarter sales of $1.31 billion, meeting expectations. The sales saw a 2.0% year-over-year (Y/Y) increase, primarily driven by a 6.6% surge in the Specialty Distribution segment. However, the Installation segment remained relatively stagnant Y/Y. The adjusted gross margin shrank to 29.9% compared to 30.4% in the same quarter last year, while the adjusted EBITDA Margin saw a slight uptick to 19.7% from 19.6%.

news.headline: Market correction checklists are crucial. Similar to preflight checks, this tool safeguards traders. Stay safe and smart.
news.summary: Similar to pilots who rely on preflight checklists for safety measures, having a trading checklist can also safeguard investors during market corrections. Utilizing this tool can be crucial in minimizing risks and keeping one on track financially. Make sure to follow the 'smart' approach when creating and using your checklist to navigate through volatile market conditions effectively. By incorporating key criteria and strategies into your checklist, you can better protect your investments and make more informed decisions during uncertain times. Stay proactive and disciplined by regularly reviewing and adjusting your checklist as needed to adapt to market fluctuations. Remember, preparation is key to successful investing.

news.headline: Cardano (ADA), Solana (SOL), and XRP drop after White House clarifies Trump's crypto reserve plan.ADA: $0.845 (-3.7%)SOL: $145.11 (+1.1%)XRP: $2.47 (-4.9%)White House aide clarifies confusion on crypto reserve mention.
news.summary: On Friday, Cardano (ADA), XRP, and Solana (SOL) experienced declines following comments from a top White House official hinting that President Trump's remarks on a broad crypto reserve may have been misinterpreted. Cardano (ADA) dropped by 3.7% to $0.845, XRP decreased by 4.9% to $2.47, and Solana (SOL) saw a minor uptick of 1.1% to $145.11. White House crypto czar David Sacks mentioned that the mentioned tokens were likely examples of leading market-cap assets and not a firm strategy, prior to the White House Crypto Summit. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GEO Group Q4 earnings: Revenue beats at $607.7M, EPS miss at 13 cents, Adj EBITDA at $108M. New immigration contract noted.
news.summary: Shares of The GEO Group, Inc. (NYSE:GEO) have dipped as the company announced fourth-quarter revenue of $607.7 million, surpassing expectations of $607.44 million. The Adjusted EBITDA dropped to $108.0 million from $129.0 million in the same quarter last year. Adjusted EPS of 13 cents fell below the anticipated 22 cents. Q4 2024 revenue showed an increase from the previous quarter, but earnings and Adjusted EBITDA were below projections due to higher general and administrative expenses. These costs were driven by a management team reorganization, additional professional fees for upcoming growth initiatives, and operations in 2025. Executive Chairman George C. Zoley commented... Note: This information is derived from a news source.

news.headline: Tulikivi Corp's financials for 1–12/2024 show improved balance sheet with equity ratio at 51.9%.

Peter Schiff criticizes government investments in crypto, calling it a waste of resources. He questions the value of holding digital assets and suggests tokenized gold as a better alternative. His comments sparked debate.
news.summary: Peter Schiff, a vocal Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) critic, has criticized government investments in cryptocurrency, stating that any country holding digital assets is at a disadvantage. In a recent post, Schiff argued that allocating public funds to crypto takes away resources from true wealth creation, and he emphasized that it is counterproductive for governments to endorse or support this allocation of capital. He raised a question about why individuals would choose crypto backed by fiat when tokenized gold is a viable alternative. Schiff's comments triggered a lively debate, with one trader playfully suggesting the creation of a "Schiff Coin." In response, Schiff hinted at the drawbacks of such an initiative.

news.headline: Dave and Coastal Community Bank partner to expand banking and ExtraCash products, enhancing financial inclusion.
news.summary: The collaboration aims to expand Dave's banking and ExtraCash offerings, enhancing financial inclusion by reaching a larger number of individuals.

news.headline: Joby Aviation Q4 earnings missed, 34 cents loss per share, Revenue $55,000 beats $45,800 estimate. JPMorgan cuts price forecast to $5 from $6 due to higher cash burn and aircraft delivery delays.
news.summary: Shares of Joby Aviation, Inc. (NYSE: JOBY) saw an uptick in trading on Thursday following the company's report of fourth-quarter losses amounting to 34 cents per share. This figure fell short of the analyst consensus prediction of a 20-cent loss. Nonetheless, Joby's revenue for the same period stood at $55,000, surpassing the estimated $45,800. JPMorgan analyst Bill Peterson reduced the price target for JOBY from $6.00 to $5.00 and upheld an Underweight rating based on concerns over anticipated higher cash burn and delays in aircraft deliveries. Peterson highlighted the potential increase in cash burn as Joby extends its operations.

news.headline: Viavi acquires Spirent's High-Speed Ethernet Unit for $410M + $15M contingent, financed by $425M loan from Wells Fargo.
news.summary: Keysight Technologies Inc. (KEYS) saw a rise in premarket trading after finalizing the sale of Spirent Communications plc’s High-Speed Ethernet and Network Security business to Viavi Solutions Inc. (VIAV). The deal encompasses a $410 million cash consideration with an additional $15 million contingent payment upon closing. Wells Fargo has committed to a $425 million Term Loan B to support the transaction financing. The acquisition agreement was reached in March 2024, involving a recommended all-cash purchase of Spirent through a Court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under the Companies Act 2006. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Readers rank importance of Trump's crypto reserve: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, XRP, or Cardano. Initial funding from Bitcoin.
news.summary: Discussions about establishing a strategic reserve that includes Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies have been trending in the cryptocurrency industry. A survey conducted by Benzinga inquired about the specific cryptocurrencies the White House administration should prioritize for this reserve. The 2024 election of Donald Trump as president resulted in a surge in various cryptocurrencies, with Bitcoin reaching record highs. Trump's recent Executive Order introduced plans for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, utilizing initial funding from government-owned Bitcoin that will not be liquidated. This decision came after Trump mentioned on social media on March 2 that the reserve could potentially encompass cryptocurrencies such as Ethereum, Solana, Cardano, and XRP Token. Readers were asked their opinions on this matter in the Benzinga survey.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile partners with Vodafone to launch SatCo, offering cellular broadband in Europe.
news.summary: Shares of AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) are seeing an increase in premarket trading today following the announcement of a partnership with Vodafone Group Plc (NASDAQ:VOD) to launch a joint venture called "SatCo" in Europe. The venture aims to provide comprehensive coverage throughout Europe, offering secure space-based cellular broadband services to both consumers and businesses through mobile network operators. SatCo will function as the exclusive distributor of AST SpaceMobile's services in Europe, operating under a turnkey model. Vodafone's engineering expertise will support a European-based network management center for the venture. Ground stations will also be established to facilitate operations.

The event will take place in Houston and London, hosting industry professionals across various sectors. This conference aims to discuss key insights and strategies for the industrial sector moving forward.

news.headline: Crypto markets dip in anticipation of White House summit. Bitcoin at $87,839.15 (-0.7%), Ethereum at $2,177.24 (-0.9%), XRP at $2.48 (-4%), Dogecoin at $0.2052 (+2.7%). Large transaction volume up by 19.5%, daily active addresses up by 10.9%.157,406 traders liquidated for $577.04 million in 24 hours. Nucleus Marketplace transfers $77.5 million worth BTC to new wallets.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is seeing a dip in prices as traders await the White House crypto summit. Prices for major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin is at $87,839.15 (-0.7%), Ethereum at $2,177.24 (-0.9%), Solana at $146.27 (+1.8%), XRP at $2.48 (-4%), Dogecoin at $0.2052 (+2.7%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001351 (+1.8%).Key statistics show a 19.5% surge in large transaction volume and a 10.9% increase in daily active addresses. Transactions over $100,000 spiked from 10,490 to 11,093 in a day, while exchanges netflows dropped by 154%. 157,406 traders were liquidated within 24 hours, resulting in losses of $577.04 million. Notably, Nucleus Marketplace moved $77.5 million worth of BTC to three new wallets on the darknet.For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

Burford Capital (NYSE:BUR) sees shares fall despite record cash realizations. Q4 revenues at $93.025M, down from $292.573M. EPS loss $(0.06) from $0.45.
news.summary: Burford Capital Limited (NYSE:BUR) witnessed a decrease in its premarket trading on Monday following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company's consolidated total revenues for the quarter were $93.025 million, a significant drop from $292.573 million in the same period the previous year. Revenues from Total Segments specific to Burford amounted to $65.692 million, down from $250.615 million year-over-year. The reported earnings per share (EPS) reflected a loss of $(0.06), a decline from $0.45 in the corresponding quarter of the prior year. The revenue in the Asset Management and Other Services Segment also saw a decrease to $15.9 million compared to $24.9 million in the same quarter a year ago. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NextNRG, Inc. closes public offering, raising $10M in funding for future projects.
Dow Jones futures rose on Lutnick's tariff hints, despite Trump's comments on tariffs. Fluctuating market sentiment.
news.summary: Stock market futures experienced an increase after Commerce Secretary Lutnick suggested that tariffs on Canada and Mexico could potentially be reduced. However, President Trump expressed support for tariffs during his speech before Congress on Tuesday evening. Despite Lutnick's comments leading to a rise in Dow Jones futures, Trump maintained his stance on tariffs by stating that a 'little disturbance' is acceptable. This development was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Hurco Companies, Inc. reported a Q1 net loss of $4.32M in fiscal year 2025, with $2.38M recorded as tax valuation allowance.
news.summary: Hurco Companies, Inc. announced its financial results for the first fiscal quarter ending on January 31, 2025. The company, trading under Nasdaq as HURC, reported a net loss of $4,320,000. This translates to a loss of $0.67 per diluted share. It is important to note that this loss includes a non-cash tax valuation allowance of $2,385,000 recorded in provision for income taxes. In comparison, during the same period in fiscal year 2024, Hurco had a net loss of $1,648,000, or $0.25 loss per diluted share.

news.headline: Silexion Therapeutics shows positive data from SIL204 in pancreatic cancer models, reducing tumors and metastases.
news.summary: New data from Silexion Therapeutics reveals that SIL204, when administered subcutaneously, successfully decreases primary tumors and metastases in clinically relevant orthotopic models where human pancreatic cancer cells develop. The study demonstrates significant efficacy in reducing both primary tumors and metastatic growth, showing promising results for SIL204 in treating pancreatic cancer. This new finding is a breakthrough in cancer treatment research and provides hope for individuals battling this aggressive disease.

news.headline: Zeitview secures $60M funding led by Climate Investment for AI inspections of critical infrastructure.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based company Zeitview, a frontrunner in visual AI technology for critical infrastructure, has recently secured a funding of $60 million. The investment was spearheaded by Climate Investment, with contributions from existing backers including Valor Equity Partners, Union Square Ventures, Upfront Ventures, Euclidean Capital, Energy Transition Ventures, Hearst Ventures, and Y Combinator. Zeitview has established itself as a market leader in providing Visual AI solutions for critical infrastructure, enhancing inspection efficiency and cost effectiveness.

news.headline: Teleflex to split into two companies: Urology, Acute Care, and OEM to become independent with tax-free share distribution.
news.summary: Wayne, Pennsylvania - On February 27, 2025, a major medical technology provider, Teleflex Incorporated (NYSE:TFX), revealed plans to divide its Urology, Acute Care, and OEM segments into a separate publicly traded entity. This decision follows an extensive review by the company's Board of Directors, who have granted Teleflex management approval to proceed with this initiative. Shareholders will receive new shares of the independent company, NewCo, through a tax-free distribution that applies specifically to U.S. tax regulations. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's focus and performance within each business sector.
